zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gervais Clifton於1318年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓時，他的父親Sir Robert Clifton27歲，母親Emma Moton25歲。他於大約1330年與Margaret Pierrepont在英國英格蘭德比夏爾素斯 文費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1378年在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gervais Clifton于1318年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓时，他的父亲Sir Robert Clifton27岁，母亲Emma Moton25岁。他于大约1330年与Margaret Pierrepont在英国英格兰德比夏爾素斯 文費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1378年在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Gervais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gervais Clifton was born in 1318, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Clifton, was 27 and his mother, Emma Moton, was 25. He married Margaret Pierrepont about 1330, in South Wingfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1378, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gervais Clifton est né en 1318, à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Clifton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Emma Moton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Pierrepont environ 1330, à South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1378, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gervais Clifton 1318 in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Clifton 27 und seine Mutter Emma Moton 25. Er hat um 1330 in South Wingfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Pierrepont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1378 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gervais Clifton è nato il nel 1318 nel Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert Clifton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Emma Moton, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Pierrepont circa 1330, nel South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1378, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gervais Cliftonが1318年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Cliftonは27歳，母Emma Motonは25歳であった。約1330年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアソウス ウィングフィールドでMargaret Pierrepontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1378年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gervais Clifton(이)가 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Clifton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Moton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 소우스 윙필드에서 Margaret Pierrepont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1378년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gervais Clifton nasceu em 1318, em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Clifton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Emma Moton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Pierrepont aproximadamente 1330, em South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1378, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gervais Clifton родился в 1318 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Clifton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Moton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Pierrepont около 1330 г. в местности соут вингфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1378 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Margaret Pierrepont aproximadamente 1330, en South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
